issue_summary: Partial patch application of [] More tests and minor things.
javadoc_before:
/** * Generates a libc6 crypt() "$1$" or Apache htpasswd "$apr1$" hash value. *

* See {@link Crypt#crypt(String, String)} or {@link #apr1Crypt(String, String)} for details. * * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the salt does not match the allowed pattern * @throws NoSuchAlgorithmException if no "MD5" algorithm implementation is available */
javadoc_after:
/** * Generates a libc6 crypt() "$1$" or Apache htpasswd "$apr1$" hash value. *

* See {@link Crypt#crypt(String, String)} or {@link #apr1Crypt(String, String)} for details. * * @throws IllegalArgumentException * if the salt does not match the allowed pattern * @throws RuntimeException * when a {@link java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException} is caught. */
